text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Symboli Rudolf's request, I accompany her to a
shrine.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Listen to that silence.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The air itself seems pure somehow. I feel as
though it's cleansing me from the inside out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Constantly questioning ourselves... Striving to do
our best... These things drive us forwards.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But as we forge ahead, our feet grow dirty and
our eyelids heavy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's why it's important to visit places like this
from time to time. So that we may empty our
minds and return to whence we began.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But there I go again, lapsing into a lecture.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Shall we head to the altar?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Now that blew the cobwebs away. I feel
light in body and soul.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And what's more, with the benefit of a clear mind,
I can see the answer to a thorny problem I was
wrestling with.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quickly, back to the academy! I must commit this
to paper!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf seems to have perked up
considerably. The shrine visit must have done her
good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We approach the altar and put our hands
together, when...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry I'm late! There was this lost kid at the
station...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you're such a Goody Two-Shoes! We're on
a schedule here—keep with the tempo!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Tempo... tent pole...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Tent pole... temple... shrine? Aha!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oho... I just thought of something rather
marvelous.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Caw! Caw!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A crow suddenly swoops down at us!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Are you hurt?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, that felt rather like a warning from the shrine
itself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I suspect it was chiding me for getting distracted
while praying and making a joke of its name.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, it may rest assured that I have learned my
lesson.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our tranquil outing has an unexpectedly
foreboding ending.
